name: Propagule Embryo
descriptionTemplate: When a {Caro} Realm Awakener releases an Exalt, it can be consumed to trigger {Devour} Effect once. After playing, choose an Awakener to gain [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. The first time an Awakener consumes {Embryo} or {Scion of Purity} each round, gain [Arg3] {plural:[Arg3]|stack|stacks} of {Propagation Frenzy}.
